index.seoDescription: Asteroid monitoring system uses the NASA NeoWS API to track near-Earth objects.
index.description: The asteroid monitoring system uses the NASA NeoWS API to track near-Earth objects. This service provides up-to-date data on all asteroids approaching Earth today, i.e.
index.descriptionSuffix: . If an asteroid crosses Earth's orbit, it is considered a potentially hazardous asteroid that poses a threat to our planet. Currently the asteroid database contains approximately
index.descriptionEnd: objects and this database grows every year.
